subcodes.first_line: This is a Book from Our presence, and verily it is a manifest Book that summoneth all unto God, the Lord of the worlds. Verily, it is the Most Great Sign [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: کتاب من لدنا و انه لکتاب مبین یدع الکل الی الله رب العالمین انه لایه الکبری
subcodes.subjects: @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @spiritual transformation, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity
